files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 1c77885..9be67b8 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -152,2 +152,9 @@ Day 147 / Week 21 observations:
 - Open issues fell from the prior week but S2 average open age reached 1 day, and social posts still mention support silence, quality drift, and integration breakage.
 - Week 21 adjustment: raise global reliability ops and S2/S1 support coverage, modestly increase dev, hold acquisition/capacity/prices stable, and post a transparent incident/reliability update.
+
+Day 154 / Week 22 observations:
+- Cash reached $1.26M. Weekly subscription payments were $1.13M against about $510k in operating costs.
+- S2 content and referrals are compounding: 4,574 new subscribers, with content producing 987 A, 842 B, and 1,376 C.
+- No outage occurred after the ops increase. Peak daily usage was 4.2M, still safely below tier-4 capacity.
+- Open issues rose to 1,981 and support/integration complaints continue. S2 age improved under 1 day, but overall volume is high.
+- Week 22 adjustment: start tier-5 R&D, increase support capacity again, raise B/C quotas for value perception, keep ads/prices stable, and publish the promised Day 154 benchmark report.
